name: Google Ads MCP
description: Official open-source MCP server enabling AI agents to query Google Ads campaigns, keywords, and performance data via the Google Ads API using natural language.

skills.name: Campaign Data Query
skills.description: Retrieve campaign performance, impression share, keyword metrics, and budget data from Google Ads accounts via natural language.

skills.name: Keyword Performance Analysis
skills.description: Analyse keyword-level performance including CTR, CPC, quality score, and search term reports across ad groups and campaigns.

skills.name: Account Structure Audit
skills.description: Map and inspect the full account hierarchy — campaigns, ad groups, ads, and assets — to surface structural optimisation opportunities.
